programmes.show_description: Every track guaranteed to pick you up and throw around the room a bit. Remove all breakables, put the kids to bed and let the pets out. It's going to get messy, very messy!
Fancy a mash up after midnight? Only massive, ad free anthems to help with your insomnia! More beats, less sleep!
No excuses, stop what you are doing, turn it up and party hard with the biggest anthems and future classics of the twenty twenties!
Melodic synths, pumping beats and shout out loud lyrics. Live your best life with some Eurodance NRG!
We spinback 3 decades to the birth of Eurodance, the 90s. With Snap, Haddaway, Ace of Base, Alice Deejay and more! A decade of dance awaits.
Join Stephanie Hirst as she spins some awesome belters! From 2000 to 2009! Here's the lowdown on her fav 3 tracks of each year.
No excuses, stop what you are doing, turn it up and party hard with the biggest anthems and classic tracks of the noughties!
He may be a legendary CBBC presenter, an Ibiza DJ and Heart's dance master but today Toby Anstis is Clubland TV's total authority on euphoric dance. Hands in the air for this one!
Dive into a world of uplifting melodies, driving beats and breakdowns to give you shivers! This is Euphoria at its finest.
Nice One, Top One, Get Sorted with 30 tracks that defined an era. Join Utah Saints and experience the early 90s rave scene with the tracks that mattered. Where's the noisy people!

programmes.show_name: Take Me To The Clouds Above!
programmes.show_description: The sound that started it all! Join us for a selection of legendary Clubland classics. Expect high-energy beats, the biggest vocal anthems and feel good party vibe for all!
The weekend, the best time of the week! Here's 50 massive anthems to get you going. Think Calvin, Sigala, Guetta and Tinie Tempah - you get the picture!
Stephanie Hirst gives us her low down on everything Trance. She's hand-picked 30 absolute belters so expect: Paul Van Dyk, Binary Finary, Chicane, Delerium and loads more!
Fancy a mash up after midnight? Only massive, ad free anthems to help with your insomnia! More beats, less sleep!
Melodic synths, pumping beats and shout out loud lyrics. Live your best life with some Eurodance NRG!
No excuses, stop what you are doing, turn it up and party hard with the biggest anthems and future classics of the twenty twenties!
The definitive floorfillers from '95 to '99, a time when stomping beats and euphoric breakdowns ruled. Fasten your seatbelts and hold on tight, it's going to get bumpy!
Twenty-five mad, crazy, colourful and totally bonkers videos of the 00s! Cheesy grins, wacky dancing, bouncing babies and work-out sessions - you know the score!

programmes.show_name: Take Me To The Clouds Above!
programmes.show_description: The sound that started it all! Join us for a selection of legendary Clubland classics. Expect high-energy beats, the biggest vocal anthems and feel good party vibe for all!
Judge Jules goes large! Get his lowdown of 1995 to 2015. The tunes we partied to, the tech that defined us and the events that shook the world!
40 blistering tracks from 2020 to 2025. With Calvin, Guetta, Doja, Gaga and so many more awesome tunes!
No excuses, stop what you are doing, turn it up and party hard with the biggest anthems and future classics of the twenty twenties!
Back with another one of those block rockin' beats! Here's 40 of the most rampant fuel filled tracks of all time! We have the beats and we're not afraid to use them.
From the fields to the clubs! Relive the rave culture with iconic tracks that defined a generation. Pure energy and essential anthems only. Ravers Unite!
Will the Chemical Brothers be out of control, or will Fatboy Slim use his weapon of choice. Electro Beats vs Big Beat, who wins. You Decide!
